text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Forget about it. It was my mistake, so I'll deal
with it myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way to the training grounds, I hear hints of
an argument. As I get closer, I see a huge pile of
cardboard boxes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Nothing much. I accidentally ordered a
thousand pairs of cleats.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But Brian, we're all on the same team! Of course
we'd be happy to help in any way we can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we scramble to reduce the surplus of
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Run, don't walk, to register for the Silence Suzuka
Commemorative Race! Sign up today and get a
pair of cleats!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! We get to race with the Suzuka?! Uh, excuse me! I'd like to sign up!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"W-wooow! I can't believe these cleats are free!"
Um... "And they're so easy to run in!"

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Sounds a little shady, but I guess there's no
harm in trying them if they're free...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Get your cleats here! They're very reasonably priced—by which I mean free! And they're also a favorite of the one and only Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
You mean we can wear the very same cleats as
Brian?! Whoa... I dunno if I can do them justice,
but I'd like a pair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little by little, the mountain of surplus cleats
shrinks. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We still have... 503 pairs left. That's quite a lot...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey... That's enough. You shouldn't take up any
more of your time fixing my mistake—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But when you think about it, we're doing good!
We already gave away 500, right?! How amazing
is that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! At this rate, we'll reduce our stock to
zero in no time! The question is what kind of
strategy we should deploy to distribute the rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Geez.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why's everyone getting so fired up on my behalf?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why's everyone getting so fired up on my behalf?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...There's such a thing as too much energy.

If it's all right with you, I'd like a pair of those
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. All right.

If it's all right with you, I'd like a pair of those
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We have 500 pairs left. Take as many as you
want.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sure. Then... I'll take them all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...? Yeah. I go through cleats pretty fast. Thanks
for letting me have them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the remaining cleats become the
property of Oguri Cap!
